hero.service2_text: If you have clients, cases, or related matters in the U.S., we can help

agendar_clase.title: LEARN PROFESSIONAL ENGLISH WITH DR. MARCUS AMBROSE
agendar_clase.lead: THE ABILITY TO SPEAK AND WRITE PROFESSIONAL ENGLISH HAS BECOME AN INDISPENSABLE TOOL FOR LATIN AMERICAN ATTORNEYS WITH INTERNATIONAL CLIENTS, MATTERS, AND COLLEAGUES
agendar_clase.individual_title: INDIVIDUAL CLASSES ON GOOGLE MEET WITH DR. MARCUS AMBROSE
agendar_clase.individual_intro: THE COURSE IS TAILORED TO YOUR GOALS AND NEEDS FOR A PROFESSIONAL LEGAL CONTEXT IN A PRACTICAL SETTING.
agendar_clase.share_hours: SCHEDULED HOURS CAN BE SHARED WITH OTHER MEMBERS OF YOUR FIRM.
agendar_clase.all_levels: CLASSES FOR ENGLISH SPEAKERS: FROM BEGINNER TO ADVANCED
agendar_clase.footnote: ** THE PROMOTIONAL PRICE REMAINS VALID WITH PREPAID CLASS PACKAGES OF 10-50 HOURS. THE COST WILL INCREASE LATER. THE PACKAGE CAN BE SHARED WITH OTHER MEMBERS OF YOUR FIRM.
agendar_clase.group_intro: IN ADDITION TO PRIVATE SESSIONS, WE HAVE DYNAMIC FORMATS DESIGNED TO OPTIMIZE RESOURCES AND FOSTER COLLECTIVE LEARNING:
agendar_clase.corporate_text: $25 USD PER HOUR FOR EACH PARTICIPANTE. SESSIONS DESIGNED FOR FIRMS OR GROUPS OF COLLEAGUES WITH SHARED INVESTMENT.
agendar_clase.intensive_text: $200 USD PER CYCLE. TEN-WEEK ONLINE GROUP PROGRAMS.
agendar_clase.network_opp: EXCELLENT OPPORTUNITY TO INTEGRATE INTO NEW TRAINING CYCLES AND PROFESSIONAL NETWORKS.
agendar_clase.notify_text: CLICK BELOW TO JOIN OUR WAITING LIST. WE WILL NOTIFY YOU IN ADVANCE EVERY TIME WE OFFER A NEW GROUP COURSE.

agendar_consulta.title: SCHEDULE CONSULTATION OR LEGAL SERVICE
agendar_consulta.lead: IF YOU ARE LOOKING TO CONSULT OR HIRE A U.S. ATTORNEY, WHOSE HOURLY RATES ARE EXCESSIVELY HIGH, YOU CAN BENEFIT FROM VERY ACCESSIBLE LEGAL FEES FROM LATAM ABOGADOS.
agendar_consulta.services_intro: WE PROVIDE SPECIALIZED LEGAL ADVICE AND CORPORATE MANAGEMENT IN THE U.S. WITH A PRACTICAL AND ECONOMICAL FOCUS FOR YOUR CLIENTS AND U.S.-RELATED MATTERS.
agendar_consulta.service_consult: LEGAL CONSULTATIONS (30 MIN): $50 USD. INITIAL ADVICE TO DEFINE STRATEGIES AND FEASIBILITY.
agendar_consulta.service_project: PROJECT-BASED HIRING: $100 USD/HR. PROFESSIONAL MANAGEMENT WITH A 5-HOUR PREPAID MINIMUM.
agendar_consulta.service_corp: U.S. CORPORATE MANAGEMENT: FROM $500 USD. COMPANY INCORPORATION AND BANK ACCOUNT OPENING.
agendar_consulta.cta: SCHEDULE YOUR CONSULTATION OR PROJECT NOW

about.title: WHO IS DR. MARCUS AMBROSE
about.lead: HE IS A TOP-TIER U.S. ATTORNEY WITH OVER 40 YEARS OF INTERNATIONAL EXPERIENCE WHO HAS A MASTER'S DEGREE IN TEACHING LEGAL ENGLISH, CONVERSATION, AND LEGAL WRITING.
about.secondary_text: HE IS ALSO RECOGNIZED AS AN AUTHOR OF ACADEMIC LEGAL PUBLICATIONS AND A PROFESSOR OF LAW AND PROFESSIONAL ENGLISH TEACHING.
about.read_publications: READ ABOUT DR. AMBROSE AND HIS PUBLICATIONS
about.digital_contact_text: Scan the QR code or click below to save Dr. Marcus Ambrose's contact to your device.

contact.title: Contact
contact.lead: Get in touch with Dr. Ambrose to request information on how we can help you with your legal situation or immigration process to the U.S.
contact.success_text: Thank you for contacting us. We will get back to you shortly.

articles.title: Articles and Publications
articles.news_article_text: Read about how Marcus Ambrose, considered by many as idealistic and visionary, tried to reform the legal system.
articles.committee_text: Ambrose was acclaimed by political and civic leaders in the state of Florida as the man who could reform the judiciary and restore the legal profession to the noble status it once enjoyed.
articles.refugee_title: YOU DON'T HAVE TO LIVE LIKE A REFUGEE
articles.refugee_text: Marcus Ambrose is a humanitarian and freedom fighter. He risked everything to help 33,000 Cubans held in concentration camp-like conditions at Guantánamo Bay.
articles.vargas_gomez_title: ANDRÉS VARGAS GÓMEZ THANKS MARCUS AMBROSE IN THE MIAMI HERALD
articles.vargas_gomez_text: Mr. Vargas, a historical figure of the Cuban exile, wrote an editorial thanking Ambrose for his sacrifice on behalf of the community in the "Guantánamo No" organization.
articles.mcdonalds_text: Ambrose fights for the underdog! Read about his 10-year saga fighting McDonald's and corporate corruption to save a former employee's life.
articles.blueprint_text: Historical document that identified key problems in the legal system and offered pragmatic solutions. It received national recognition.
articles.ten_tips_text: Ambrose has taught trial lawyers the art of persuasion. Anyone who wants to learn sophisticated communication skills can benefit.
articles.hollywood_rev_text: As a SAG Actor and entertainment lawyer, Marcus called for a revolution against corruption in the show business.
articles.wall_street_text: In 1984, he wrote the script "A Conflict of Interest." His story was adapted without authorization for the Oscar-winning film "Wall Street" (1987).
articles.acting_text: Ambrose is a Sag-Aftra actor. Visualize his talent in various cinematic scenes.
articles.appellant_brief_text: Example of a formal opening brief filed in appellate proceedings in U.S. courts.
articles.combined_brief_text: Appellant's combined reply and cross-respondent's brief, demonstrating advanced legal argumentation.

legal_writings_page.title: Legal Writing Examples
legal_writings_page.lead: Below, Dr. Marcus Ambrose shares real legal writings (with confidential information redacted) to demonstrate the standard and quality of argumentation and formatting used in U.S. higher courts.

social_conscience.title: Our Social Conscience
social_conscience.lead: Dr. Ambrose is a man of faith and empathy who wishes to give back to those who are disadvantaged. His commitment to justice transcends the purely commercial sphere.
social_conscience.humanitarian_intro: Throughout his career, Dr. Marcus Ambrose has led and participated in humanitarian causes and pro-bono defenses against injustice.
social_conscience.cuba_text: Articles on the fight for rights in Guantánamo.
social_conscience.miami_herald_text: Article written by Andres Vargas about his generous acts (Miami Herald).
social_conscience.labor_justice_text: Article about the battle won against abuse toward a Hispanic woman.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At Latam Abogados, we value your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This notice describes how we collect, use, and share your information.
privacy.section1_text: We collect information that you provide directly to us when:
privacy.item1_1: You schedule a legal consultation or a class.
privacy.item1_2: You communicate with us via email or WhatsApp.
privacy.item1_3: You download resources from our website.
privacy.item2_1: Provide the requested legal and educational services.
privacy.item2_2: Send appointment confirmations and related materials.
privacy.item2_3: Improve the experience of our website.
privacy.item2_4: Comply with legal obligations in the United States and Mexico.
privacy.section3_text: We implement technical and administrative security measures to protect your data against unauthorized access, loss, or alteration.
privacy.section4_text: You have the right to access, rectify, or cancel the use of your personal data. To exercise these rights, you can contact us at marcus@latamabogados.com.
privacy.section5_text: We reserve the right to update this notice at any time. Changes will be posted on this page with the corresponding update date.

cookies.title: Cookies Policy
cookies.intro: This site uses cookies to improve your browsing experience and analyze traffic.
cookies.what_are_cookies_text: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device when you visit a website.
cookies.essential_text: Necessary for the basic operation of the site.
cookies.analytics_text: They help us understand how visitors interact with the site (Google Analytics).
cookies.marketing_text: Used to track the effectiveness of our advertising campaigns.
cookies.control_text: You can set your browser to refuse all or some cookies. However, this may affect the site's functionality.
